name: Kids Snackin' Corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Pop the corn using an air popper without added fat for fewer calories.
2. Over low heat, melt the butter or margarine with peanut butter until it becomes runny.
3. Drizzle the melted mixture over the popcorn and mix well to ensure even coating.
4. Spread the popcorn in a shallow baking pan.
5. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes, stirring 2 or 3 times. This will crisp up the corn and set the topping.
6. Enjoy your snack!
